name: Killer Bread (Broiler)
recipeIngredient: 2 Tbsp finely chopped fresh basil or 2 tsp dried, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Mix together mayonnaise, Parmesan cheese, and garlic in a large bowl until well blended.
3. Arrange the bread cut side up on a large cookie sheet. Spread butter evenly over the bread.
4. Place the cookie sheet under the broiler and heat until the bread is crisp and lightly browned.
5. Spread the Parmesan mixture over the cut sides of the bread.
6. Continue broiling until the top is puffed and golden brown.
7. Sprinkle with chopped basil, cut into wedges, and serve.
